g.title: POTS_QSP
g.text: Postural Orthostatic Tachycardia Syndrome (POTS, 체위성 기립성 빈맥 증후군) — Integrated QSP Mechanistic Map
Orthostatic Venous Pooling · Baroreflex Arc · Neuropathic / Hyperadrenergic / Hypovolemic / Autoimmune Subtypes → Excessive Standing Tachycardia
Midodrine (α1 agonist) · Beta-blockers (propranolol/bisoprolol) · Fludrocortisone · Ivabradine (If blocker) · Pyridostigmine · Droxidopa · Volume/exercise therapy
